data.title: Write RED test: requires_visual_verification metadata structural boundary
data.description:
## Story
2d82-f15f — Enriched task descriptions: requires_visual_verification metadata

## Goal
Write a failing (RED) structural boundary test that validates the requires_visual_verification detection logic in implementation-plan SKILL.md before the logic is added.

## Test File
tests/skills/test-implementation-plan-visual-verification.sh

## Test Cases (≥3 required)
1. **test_visual_verification_detection_heading_present** — A section or subsection about visual verification / requires_visual_verification exists in Step 3 of SKILL.md
2. **test_visual_verification_metadata_field_mentioned** — The string `requires_visual_verification: true` (the metadata field) appears in the SKILL.md section
3. **test_visual_verification_ui_file_patterns_listed** — The detection patterns for UI files (.css, .js, .ts, .tsx, .html, .jinja2 or similar) are mentioned in the section
4. **test_visual_verification_playwright_ac_mentioned** — Playwright is mentioned as the verification tool in the section

## Acceptance Criteria
- Test file exists and is executable
- All test cases FAIL before implementation (RED)
- All test cases PASS after implementation (GREEN)
- Follows behavioral-testing-standard.md Rule 5: structural boundary only
- Uses the same structure as tests/scripts/test-implementation-plan-task-description.sh

## .test-index
After creating this file, add entry to .test-index:
  plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md → tests/skills/test-implementation-plan-visual-verification.sh [test_visual_verification_detection_heading_present]

## Files to Modify
- tests/skills/test-implementation-plan-visual-verification.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (UPDATE — add RED marker)
